name: 快递100-mcp-server
description: 快递100 MCP Server提供快递信息查询、快递运费预估比价、快递时效查询（含发货前时效查询与在途动态时效查询）等功能。 Express100 MCP Server provides functions such as express delivery information queries, courier freight estimation and comparison, and transit time inquiries (including pre-shipment transit time checks and in-transit dynamic time estimates).
